tam.formula: Global PM software spend x estimated share attributable to PM operating workflow and synthesis tools.

sam.formula: English-speaking B2B product teams in startup and enterprise SaaS segments x reachable seat and team pricing.

som.formula: Initial reachable segment of AI-forward PM organizations over a 3-year adoption window.

assumptions.statement: Reachable PM organizations are concentrated in B2B SaaS teams already adopting AI-assisted workflows.

sensitivity_notes: SAM shrinks materially if adoption is limited to enterprise PM teams with formal governance needs.
